description: A self-hosted, real-time port monitoring and discovery tool that automatically discovers and maps network services across systems.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
Portracker is a self-hosted port monitoring tool that automatically discovers network services.
                
Read this before installing: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/t/added-portracker-to-bigbearcasaos/5003?u=dragonfire1119

title: Portracker
